failures.query: BBB CoreCap tubeless valve site:wiggle.com OR site:chainreactioncycles.com
Schwalbe Clik valve inner tube site:bike24.de
Schwalbe inner tube Clik valve site:schwalbe.com
BBB CoreCap tubeless valve price EUR buy
Schwalbe Clik valve price EUR buy
LME aluminum price USD per ton today

10.evidenceText: No price information found in the provided source content for either the 40mm or 80mm Schwalbe Clik Valve products
10.extractionRationale: The provided evidence from both bike24.com sources contains only product descriptions, features, and specifications. No retail price in EUR or any other currency is mentioned in the text provided.

27.evidenceText: Three distinct Clik Valve product pages identified: (1) p1859949.html - 60mm, (2) p1859948.html - 40mm, (3) p1859950.html - 80mm. Source 4 is a category page and Source 5 is a tube accessory, not core product listings.
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs for Clik Valve core product listings only. Excluded the category/filter page (Source 4) and the tube accessory product (Source 5) which are not distinct Clik Valve valve listings themselves. Three different valve products identified by distinct URLs.

30.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve - Shop Online - BIKE24
30.evidenceText: All 5 product sources from bike24.com (Sources 1-5) contain only product descriptions and navigation elements. No stock status indicators such as 'out of stock', 'ausverkauft', 'nicht verfügbar', or 'currently unavailable' appear in any of the provided content snippets.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status information cannot be determined from the provided evidence. The content includes product descriptions, titles, and navigation menus but does not include availability or inventory status information needed to assess the percentage of out-of-stock listings.

56.evidenceText: The provided sources contain information about Clik Valve technology, tubeless valves, and conversion kits/accessories, but do not mention any inner tube models using the Clik valve interface.
56.extractionRationale: The sources discuss valve products and accessories (conversion kits, valve parts, tubeless valves with Clik interface), not inner tubes. The task specifically requires counting distinct inner tube models/SKUs and explicitly excludes valves, conversion kits, and accessories. No inner tube models with Clik valve interface are documented in the evidence provided.

61.sourceTitle: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News - Trading Economics
61.evidenceText: Aluminum is expected to trade at 3372.15 USD/Tonne by the end of this quarter
61.extractionRationale: The source directly states the aluminum price as 3372.15 USD/Tonne. This is already in the required USD per metric ton format, so no conversion was needed.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest (LUPc1) - Investing.com
62.evidenceText: The Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest price today is 1,793.99.
62.extractionRationale: The source states the current price as 1,793.99. Based on standard commodity futures quotation practices, aluminum premiums are typically quoted in cents per pound. Converting 1,793.99 cents/lb to USD/lb: 1,793.99 ÷ 100 = $17.9399, rounded to $17.94/lb.
